extensions.name: ConSpace
extensions.author: Eric Eve and Steve Breslin
extensions.desc: An extension to enhance modelling of spatial relations and to allow several rooms to act as one large subdivided location. Version 2.1, by Eric Eve and Steve Breslin.

extensions.name: ContWithLid
extensions.author: Steve Breslin
extensions.desc: A module that adds containers that can be closed by a specific object, such as a separate lid. Version 1, by Steve Breslin.

extensions.name: Dstrucs
extensions.author: Kevin Forchione
extensions.desc: A module that implements a number of low-level data structures: nodes, single- and double-linked lists, circular single- and double-linked lists, stacks, and queues. Version 2.0.1, by Kevin Forchione.

extensions.name: DupDobj
extensions.author: Eric Eve
extensions.desc: An extension to allow author control over the handling of duplicate direct objects in the same command (e.g. EXAMINE LEAVES, TWIGS AND BRANCHES). Version 1.2, by Eric Eve.

extensions.name: LookDir
extensions.author: Eric Eve
extensions.desc: A module that implements >LOOK [direction] commands (e.g. "LOOK NORTH"). Version 4, by Eric Eve.

extensions.name: MazeGenerator
extensions.author: Jeffrey W. Bowyer
extensions.desc: Virtual Maze Generator, version 1, by Jeffrey W. Bowyer. Archive contains a Java component to produces a perfect maze, and a TADS 3 class for crawling that maze.

extensions.name: MultiMorphic
extensions.author: Kevin Forchione
extensions.desc: An implementation of a class which allows an author to simulate changing an object's superclass dynamically at runtime. Version 1.0, by Kevin Forchione.

extensions.name: OccludingConnector
extensions.author: Steve Breslin
extensions.desc: A module that enables a sense connector to disallow an object to be sensed through it. Version 1, by Steve Breslin.

extensions.name: Pathfinders
extensions.author: Steve Breslin
extensions.desc: A collection of the following pathfinding algorithms, for searching any kind of graph or tree: breadth-first, double-breadth (bi-directional), Floyd, Dijkstra and `A*`. Written by Steve Breslin.

extensions.name: SayQuery
extensions.author: Eric Eve
extensions.desc: An extension implementing SayTopic and QueryTopic and allowing suggested topics to be selected by number or by clicking on hyperlinks. Version 1.0, by Eric Eve.

extensions.name: SpellingCorrector
extensions.author: Steve Breslin in collaboration with Andreas Sewe
extensions.desc: A context-sensitive typo and spelling corrector. Version 1.1, by Steve Breslin in collaboration with Andreas Sewe.

extensions.name: SunTracker
extensions.author: Zachary Hutchinson
extensions.desc: A module to provide tracking of the sun, using the TimeSys module. Written by Zachary Hutchinson.

extensions.name: T3checks
extensions.author: Stephen Granade
extensions.desc: A module which keeps track of what capabilities a given interpreter has, such as the ability to display images. Version 1.0, by Stephen Granade.

extensions.name: TCommand
extensions.author: Eric Eve
extensions.desc: TCommand version 3, by Eric Eve. An extension of the CommandTopic class (For example, to allow matches on the direct or indirect object of the command as well as the command action).

extensions.name: achievement
extensions.author: Greg Boettcher
extensions.desc: For implementing and locally storing Steam-style achievements. Also for storing information that needs to persist across multiple playthroughs. Version 1.0, by Greg Boettcher.

extensions.name: adv3Lite
extensions.author: Eric Eve
extensions.desc: Version 1.6.1 of adv3Lite, an alternative library for use with TADS 3, by Eric Eve. Freeware.

extensions.name: asto
extensions.author: Kevin Forchione
extensions.desc: Adds an integer property to each non-class object, and sets it to a value giving the "absolute" order of the object definition in the program source. Version 2.0, written by Kevin Forchione.

extensions.name: autosave
extensions.author: Michel Nizette
extensions.desc: An extension that allows the player to restore the game to an earlier state determined by the game itself, like "undo", except that the story is brought back to a specific point rather than one turn backwards. Version November 23, 2008, by Michel Nizette.

extensions.name: combine
extensions.author: Krister Fundin
extensions.desc: An extension that combines consecutive action reports. Version 4, by Krister Fundin.

extensions.name: compass
extensions.author: Steve Breslin and Krister Fundin
extensions.desc: A module to make a banner displaying a compass, version 3, by Steve Breslin and Krister Fundin.

extensions.name: contaction
extensions.author: Kevin Forchione
extensions.desc: ContAction, a library extension that provides an abstract mechanism for implementing continuous actions. Version 2.6, by Kevin Forchione.

extensions.name: cquotes
extensions.author: Stephen Granade
extensions.desc: A module that converts single straight quotes (') to curly ones (‘). Will either change just the ones which appear in standard English contractions such as "won't," or will change every single quote it finds that is preceeded by a letter or punctuation. Version 0.2, by Stephen Granade.

extensions.name: csc
extensions.author: M.D. Dollahite and Steve Breslin
extensions.desc: The TADS 3 Complex Sense Connector library, an extension to provide a more versatile approach to sense connectors. Version 1.2, by M.D. Dollahite and Steve Breslin.

extensions.name: diff
extensions.author: Kevin Forchione
extensions.desc: A small library extension that allows you to perform an operation or action silently and without consequences, just to observe the potential results upon the state of the game.  Version 1.0, by Kevin Forchione.

extensions.name: easyListing
extensions.author: Emily Boegheim
extensions.desc: An extension making it quicker and easier to print simple lists, including offering message parameter substitutions for lists (e.g. "{the/list yourList}"). Version 0.3, by Emily Boegheim.

extensions.name: flags
extensions.author: Kevin Forchione
extensions.desc: A module that supports bit flags and bitwise operators that are larger than those supported by the internal 32-bit infrastructure of TADS 3. Version 2.0, by Kevin Forchione.

extensions.name: hypoTester
extensions.author: Steve Breslin and Krister Fundin
extensions.desc: An extension that allows the game to forsee whether an action will pass the canonical verify and check routines. Version 4, by Steve Breslin and Krister Fundin.

extensions.name: imm
extensions.author: Kevin Forchione
extensions.desc: An implementation of an "inherited" multi-method mechanism for TADS 3 multi-methods, by Kevin Forchione.

extensions.name: kfDebug
extensions.author: Krister Fundin
extensions.desc: A debugging suite, including an in-game expression evaluator. Version 1, by Krister Fundin.

extensions.name: listControl
extensions.author: Eric Eve
extensions.desc: An extension to allow short pieces of variable text. Version 0.2, by Eric Eve.

extensions.name: londoncabs
extensions.author: Kevin Forchione
extensions.desc: London Cabs, a module to simulate the cabbie system used by Infocom's Sherlock: The Riddle of the Crown Jewels. Version 1.0.2, by Kevin Forchione.

extensions.name: match
extensions.author: Krister Fundin
extensions.desc: An extension that provides complex object matching techniques and reduces the need for object loops. Version 3, by Krister Fundin.

extensions.name: megatads
extensions.author: Krister Fundin
extensions.desc: A collection of extensions and patches for the standard TADS 3 library. Version 1, by Krister Fundin.

extensions.name: memory
extensions.author: Steve Breslin
extensions.desc: A module that records Actor memory of object locations, and provides an >OBJECTS verb that players can use to refresh their memory as to the PC's memory of object locations. Version 1, by Steve Breslin.

extensions.name: msg_custom
extensions.author: Greg Boettcher
extensions.desc: An extension that allows authors to customize the standard TADS 3 messages, changing them with regard to smart/curly quotes, contractions, formal versus casual language, etc. Version 2.2, by Greg Boettcher.

extensions.name: ncDebugActions
extensions.author: Nikos Chantziaras
extensions.desc: Debugging verbs for testing a game. The verbs are modelled after those in the TADS 2 module wizard.t. Version 1.1, by Nikos Chantziaras.

extensions.name: nobreak
extensions.author: Brendan Barnwell
extensions.desc: An extension to allow switch statements to be written without having to include explicit breaks between cases, by Brendan Barnwell.

extensions.name: optimizations
extensions.author: Steve Breslin
extensions.desc: Two proof-of-concept tests for optimizing some computation-heavy code in the standard adv3 library. Version 1, by Steve Breslin.

extensions.name: padlock
extensions.author: Greg Boettcher
extensions.desc: A TADS 3 implementation of padlocks and padlockable things. Version 1.0, by Greg Boettcher.

extensions.name: proteus
extensions.author: Kevin Forchione
extensions.desc: A collection of inter-related modules that provide information on TADS 3 metadata, as well as implementing some object-oriented design patterns. Version 1.1.5, by Kevin Forchione.

extensions.name: qtalk
extensions.author: Greg Boettcher
extensions.desc: A library for Photopia style menu-based conversations, allowing for submenus, and looping and repeating conversations. Version 2, by Greg Boettcher.

extensions.name: reaction
extensions.author: Emily Boegheim
extensions.desc: An extension offering rules-based handling of beforeAction and afterAction code. Version 0.2, by Emily Boegheim.

extensions.name: relation
extensions.author: Kevin Forchione
extensions.desc: A library that adds relations to TADS 3. It allows you to define arbitrary relations between objects and search through those relations. Version 3.0, by Kevin Forchione.

extensions.name: rextok
extensions.author: Kevin Forchione
extensions.desc: A library that extends regular expression searches from strings to token lists and vectors. Version 2.0, by Kevin Forchione.

extensions.name: rulebooks
extensions.author: Kevin Forchione
extensions.desc: A library extension that refactors the definitions of rules and rulebooks making it easier to work with these datatypes. Version 1.1, by Kevin Forchione.

extensions.name: scenes
extensions.author: Eric Eve
extensions.desc: An extension that provides a means of defining and manipulating scenes in a way similar to the scenes mechanism available in Inform 7. Version 1.0, by Eric Eve.

extensions.name: splitgame
extensions.author: Chris Odhner
extensions.desc: A library to implement two-column, two-player games. Included are the library module and a sample game. Version 0.9, by Chris Odhner.

extensions.name: t3knowledge
extensions.author: Steve Breslin
extensions.desc: A module to make knowledge tracking more intuitive by adding extra support for NPC knowledge. Version 1.1, by Steve Breslin.

extensions.name: t3RAP
extensions.author: Nate Cull. Updated TADS 3 version 1.2 by Steve Breslin
extensions.desc: The TADS 3 Reactive Agent Planner, which automates complex NPC behavior. Original TADS 2 module by Nate Cull. Updated TADS 3 version 1.2 by Steve Breslin.

extensions.name: tests
extensions.author: Ben Cressey and Eric Eve
extensions.desc: An implementation of easy-to-use Inform-7-style "test me" script playback, where test scripts defined in the source can be invoked during play-testing. Written by Ben Cressey and Eric Eve.

extensions.name: tests2
extensions.author: Ben Cressey and Eric Eve, and updated by NR Turner
extensions.desc: An implementation of easy-to-use Inform-7-style "test me" script playback, where test scripts defined in the source can be invoked during play-testing. Originally written by Ben Cressey and Eric Eve, and updated by NR Turner.

extensions.name: timepasses
extensions.author: Soren Lovborg
extensions.desc: A library to replace the default "Time passess..." message, by Soren Lovborg.

extensions.name: timesys
extensions.author: Kevin Forchione
extensions.desc: A time-oriented library for TADS 3, providing support for input and output of times and dates. Version 3.0.3, by Kevin Forchione.

extensions.name: tips
extensions.author: Krister Fundin
extensions.desc: An extension for displaying tips directed at inexperienced players. Version 1, by Krister Fundin.

extensions.name: toksync
extensions.author: Kevin Forchione
extensions.desc: A library that allows a new token to be added to the command tokenizer. Version 1.1, by Kevin Forchione.

extensions.name: tsp
extensions.author: Kevin Forchione
extensions.desc: TSP version 1.0.2, a TADS 3 Services Pack library extension. A collection of mechanisms supporting a wide variety of extended services for the TADS 3 language, by Kevin Forchione.

extensions.name: xactor
extensions.author: Choices
extensions.desc: A library to help write adult-themed games. Version 1.05, by Choices.

extensions.name: textMenu
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 module for text-based menus

extensions.name: notReallyRandom
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 module providing instanceable PRNGs

extensions.name: intMath
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 module for mathematical tools using integer approximations.

extensions.name: routeTable
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 that implements simple routing tables for pathfinding. Requires the simpleGraph module.

extensions.name: simpleGraph
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 module for handling simple undirected graphs

extensions.name: statTest
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 module designed to make it easier to implement simple statistical tests

extensions.name: autoTest
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 module that assists implementing automated testing without the use of a command file,

extensions.name: remoteView
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 module implementing a remote viewing sense connector enabled by looking through it

extensions.name: debugTool
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 module providing runtime debugging tools, including stack traces and a rudimentary interactive debugger

extensions.name: nounAsVerb
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 module for implementing actions that are invoked by bare noun phrases typed on the command line

extensions.name: debugToolLite
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A port of the debugTool interactive(-ish) debugger to work with adv3lite

extensions.name: bufferedOutputFilter
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 module implementing simple buffered output filters for purely typographic formatting using HTML/XML-ish tags

extensions.name: dynamicWord
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: DEPRECATED, use dynamicThing instead

extensions.name: patchLoader
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: This module implements a mechanism for post-release patching of TADS3 games

extensions.name: eventHandler
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 module implementing a simple event handler model allowing objects to subscribe to notifications from other objects

extensions.name: dynamicThing
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 module that extends Thing to make it easier to dynamically change the vocabulary associated with an object based on player knowledge and game state

extensions.name: newActorCommand
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 module that implements a global function similar to newActorAction() but which takes a text string instead of an action instance

extensions.name: absentActor
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 module that allows actors to remember when and where they saw other actors

extensions.name: lastTyped
extensions.author: Diegesis & Mimesis
extensions.desc: A TADS3 module for keeping track of the specific nouns and verbs in a typed command

extensions.name: t3cartographer
extensions.author: Tomas Öberg
extensions.desc: The Tads3 Cartographer library is tool that generates a map from your Tads3 source code that can be used either as an aid when developing your game or as an in-game map for the player. It supports various output formats. Depending on your solution and framework it can be a map in svg, html, dot-graphics or plain old ascii.

extensions.name: AdventEX
extensions.author: Th3OneAndOnly
extensions.desc: AdventEX(tension) - The versatile extension to Adv3 that we all need!

extensions.name: G-TADS
extensions.author: Mikawa
extensions.desc: German Library Extension for TADS 3
